[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010101 3
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 010111101 6
4 000001100 2
5 001010011 4
6 011000101 4
7 111010101 6

01 10 010111101 6 match 3
12 21 001011111 6
23 32 011010111 6
34 43 111010101 6 match 7
45 54 111110101 7
56 65 100110111 6
67 76 110111111 8
70 07 010111101 6 match 3

02 20 011111111 8
13 31 011001101 5
24 42 111010111 7
35 53 011110101 6
46 64 111110111 8
57 75 010111101 6 match 3
60 06 110111111 8
71 17 010011101 5

03 30 011111101 7

25 52 001110111 6
36 63 111100111 7
47 74 111011101 7
50 05 010111101 6 match 3
61 16 100101110 5
72 27 011011111 7

26 62 101110011 6
37 73 011011101 6
